heading: Limits of superintendencies, agencies, and sub­agencies
label: 40 Limits of superintendencies, agencies, and sub­agencies
text: The limits of each superintendency, agency, and subagency shall be established by the Secretary of the Interior, either by tribes or geographical boundaries.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2066 derived from acts , ; , .June 30, 1834, ch. 162, § 74 Stat. 736Mar. 3, 1847, ch. 66, § 19 Stat. 203

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of other officers, employees, and agencies of Department of the Interior, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of the Interior, with power to delegate, see Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1950, §§ 1, 2, eff. , 15 F.R. 3174, , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.May 24, 195064 Stat. 1262
